BackstoryDef.title: dominion combat medic
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] served as a combat medic in the Dominion's corporate military, treating casualties under fire with whatever supplies were available. [PAWN_pronoun] learned that the difference between alive and dead is often a matter of seconds and preparation.

BackstoryDef.title: forward surgical officer
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] performed surgery in forward operating conditions for the Dominion's corporate military, developing exceptional skill under circumstances that no clinical setting could replicate. [PAWN_pronoun] was precise and fast and learned never to think about the odds.

BackstoryDef.title: military medical researcher
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] conducted medical research for a Dominion corporate military division, developing treatments optimized for combat injuries and the specific conditions of active operations. [PAWN_pronoun] learned to separate the research from its applications.

BackstoryDef.title: extraction medic
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] specialized in extracting and stabilizing casualties from active combat zones, developing a precise understanding of what the human body can survive and what it cannot. [PAWN_pronoun] operated alone more often than the protocols suggested and came back more often than the odds suggested.

BackstoryDef.title: dominion field surgeon
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] performed surgical procedures in the field for Dominion military operations, working in conditions that would have been unacceptable in any other context. [PAWN_pronoun] kept more people alive than [PAWN_possessive] equipment should have allowed.

BackstoryDef.title: dominion combat engineer
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] served as a combat engineer in the Dominion's corporate military, building fortifications, clearing obstacles, and occasionally doing both in the same engagement. [PAWN_pronoun] learned to work fast under conditions that made careful work difficult.

BackstoryDef.title: military demolitions expert
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] specialized in demolitions for the Dominion's corporate military, developing a precise understanding of structural failure and the forces required to cause it. [PAWN_pronoun] was methodical and careful and very good at a job that rewarded both.

BackstoryDef.title: forward installation builder
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] constructed forward operating installations for Dominion military operations, building functional fortifications under active field conditions. [PAWN_pronoun] learned to build things that worked rather than things that looked like they should.

BackstoryDef.title: dominion siege engineer
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] served in the Dominion's corporate military as a siege specialist, breaching fortifications and constructing assault positions under fire. [PAWN_pronoun] developed a comprehensive understanding of defensive construction by spending years defeating it.

BackstoryDef.title: military systems technician
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] maintained and repaired the mechanical and electronic systems of Dominion military installations and equipment. [PAWN_pronoun] learned that in the field the difference between functional and broken is often the difference between alive and dead.

BackstoryDef.title: dominion line officer
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] commanded a line unit in the Dominion's corporate military, leading soldiers through operations that the corporate briefings made sound simpler than they were. [PAWN_pronoun] learned to trust [PAWN_possessive] own judgment over the briefings.

BackstoryDef.title: corporate military commander
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] commanded a significant Dominion corporate military force, planning and executing operations across multiple engagements. [PAWN_pronoun] learned that command at scale is an exercise in managing consequences rather than preventing them.

BackstoryDef.title: dominion tactical officer
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] served as a tactical planning officer in the Dominion's corporate military, developing operational plans for engagements that ranged from straightforward to catastrophic. [PAWN_pronoun] learned to plan for the second and hope for the first.

BackstoryDef.title: corporate special operations officer
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] commanded special operations units for a Dominion corporate military division, leading small teams on assignments that did not appear in official operational records. [PAWN_pronoun] learned that the most effective operations are the ones nobody hears about.

BackstoryDef.title: dominion garrison commander
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] commanded a Dominion corporate military garrison, responsible for the security of a corporate installation and the management of the soldiers assigned to it. [PAWN_pronoun] learned that maintaining order in peacetime requires different skills than maintaining it in conflict and that the Dominion rarely distinguishes between the two.
